privileged_info_summary: The task creates a stock inventory in Ekylibre (an open-source farm management system) with the name 'Year-End Stock Count Jan 2024' dated 2024-01-15, requiring at least 2 product items with quantity entries. These requirements are consistently specified across the task description, metadata, and verifier code. Ekylibre is confirmed as a real system with stock inventory capabilities.
